message:
test(oracle): add 16 conformance test suites (377 total)

New suites: multi-join aggregates, complex WHERE expressions, INSERT SELECT,
CASE expression edges, outer join patterns, transaction semantics,
COLLATE NOCASE, AUTOINCREMENT, implicit type conversion, aggregate on empty
table, UPDATE patterns, DELETE with subqueries, DISTINCT+GROUP BY interaction,
lateral column aliases, SAVEPOINT, DEFAULT VALUES.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
